examples.en: The baby needs a fresh diaper after her nap.
examples.zh: 寶寶午睡後需要換一片乾淨的尿布。

examples.en: We ran out of diapers, so I went to the store.
examples.zh: 我們尿布用完了,所以我去了商店。

examples.en: The toddler took his first wobbly steps today.
examples.zh: 這名幼兒今天踏出了搖搖晃晃的第一步。

examples.en: Toddlers love to explore everything around them.
examples.zh: 學步幼兒喜歡探索周遭的一切。

examples.en: She pushed the stroller through the park.
examples.zh: 她推著嬰兒推車穿過公園。

examples.en: The stroller folds up to fit in the car trunk.
examples.zh: 這台推車可以折疊放進後車廂。

examples.en: The baby takes a long nap every afternoon.
examples.zh: 寶寶每天下午都會睡個長長的午覺。

examples.en: He gets cranky when he misses his nap.
examples.zh: 他沒睡午覺時會變得暴躁。

examples.en: The baby learned to crawl at seven months.
examples.zh: 寶寶在七個月大時學會爬行。

examples.en: She crawled across the floor to reach her toy.
examples.zh: 她爬過地板去拿玩具。

examples.en: I warmed the bottle before feeding him.
examples.zh: 餵他之前我先把奶瓶加熱。

examples.en: The baby finished the whole bottle quickly.
examples.zh: 寶寶很快就喝完整瓶奶。

examples.en: The pacifier helped the baby calm down.
examples.zh: 奶嘴幫助寶寶冷靜下來。

examples.en: He dropped his pacifier on the ground again.
examples.zh: 他又把奶嘴掉在地上了。

examples.en: We placed the baby gently in the crib.
examples.zh: 我們輕輕地把寶寶放進嬰兒床。

examples.en: The crib has soft bars for safety.
examples.zh: 這張嬰兒床有柔軟的護欄以策安全。

examples.en: You should burp the baby after feeding.
examples.zh: 餵完奶後應該幫寶寶拍嗝。

examples.en: The baby gave a loud burp and smiled.
examples.zh: 寶寶大聲打了個嗝,然後笑了。

examples.en: The baby cries a lot during teething.
examples.zh: 寶寶在長牙期會哭很多。

examples.en: A cold ring can ease teething pain.
examples.zh: 冰涼的固齒器可以緩解長牙的疼痛。

examples.en: She cradled the newborn in her arms.
examples.zh: 她把新生兒輕輕抱在懷裡。

examples.en: He gently cradled the baby until she slept.
examples.zh: 他輕輕搖抱著寶寶直到她睡著。

examples.en: A soft song can soothe a crying baby.
examples.zh: 輕柔的歌聲能安撫哭泣的寶寶。

examples.en: She rocked him to soothe his fussing.
examples.zh: 她搖著他來安撫他的哭鬧。

examples.en: We painted the nursery a soft yellow.
examples.zh: 我們把育嬰室漆成柔和的黃色。

examples.en: The nursery is full of stuffed animals.
examples.zh: 育嬰室裡滿是絨毛玩具。

examples.en: The baby sat in the highchair for lunch.
examples.zh: 寶寶坐在高腳餐椅上吃午餐。

examples.en: Please buckle her into the highchair.
examples.zh: 請把她扣好在高腳餐椅上。

examples.en: Put a bib on him before he eats.
examples.zh: 他吃飯前先幫他戴上圍兜。

examples.en: The bib caught all the spilled food.
examples.zh: 圍兜接住了所有掉落的食物。

examples.en: I used a wipe to clean her sticky hands.
examples.zh: 我用濕紙巾擦乾淨她黏黏的手。

examples.en: Keep some wipes in the diaper bag.
examples.zh: 在尿布包裡放一些濕紙巾。

examples.en: The baby shook the rattle happily.
examples.zh: 寶寶開心地搖著手搖鈴。

examples.en: A colorful rattle can grab her attention.
examples.zh: 色彩繽紛的搖鈴能吸引她的注意力。

examples.en: Nurses swaddle newborns to keep them cozy.
examples.zh: 護理師會把新生兒包起來讓他們感到舒適。

examples.en: He learned how to swaddle the baby snugly.
examples.zh: 他學會了如何把寶寶緊緊包好。

examples.en: She sang a soft lullaby at bedtime.
examples.zh: 她在睡前唱了一首輕柔的搖籃曲。

examples.en: The lullaby slowly put him to sleep.
examples.zh: 搖籃曲慢慢地哄他入睡。

examples.en: The baby started to fuss before dinner.
examples.zh: 寶寶在晚餐前開始哭鬧。

examples.en: He fusses whenever he feels tired.
examples.zh: 他一累就會鬧脾氣。

examples.en: The baby giggled at the funny faces.
examples.zh: 寶寶看到鬼臉咯咯地笑。

examples.en: She giggles every time we play peekaboo.
examples.zh: 每次玩躲貓貓她都會咯咯笑。

examples.en: Babies often drool when they are teething.
examples.zh: 寶寶長牙時常常流口水。

examples.en: His shirt was wet where he drooled.
examples.zh: 他流口水的地方把衣服弄濕了。

examples.en: She nurses the baby every three hours.
examples.zh: 她每三小時哺乳寶寶一次。

examples.en: He fell asleep while nursing.
examples.zh: 他在哺乳時睡著了。

examples.en: We feed him formula when I am at work.
examples.zh: 我上班時我們餵他配方奶。

examples.en: Mix the formula with warm water.
examples.zh: 把配方奶和溫水混合。

examples.en: I spoon-feed her mashed carrots.
examples.zh: 我用湯匙餵她吃胡蘿蔔泥。

examples.en: He is too little to eat without being spoon-fed.
examples.zh: 他太小了,不用湯匙餵就吃不了。

examples.en: Mashed banana is easy for babies to eat.
examples.zh: 搗碎的香蕉寶寶容易入口。

examples.en: She made some mashed potatoes for lunch.
examples.zh: 她做了一些馬鈴薯泥當午餐。

examples.en: The doctor said we can start solids at six months.
examples.zh: 醫生說我們六個月大時可以開始吃副食品。

examples.en: He is slowly getting used to solids.
examples.zh: 他正慢慢習慣吃固體食物。

examples.en: The doctor tracks the baby's growth every month.
examples.zh: 醫生每個月追蹤寶寶的成長狀況。

examples.en: Good sleep supports a child's growth.
examples.zh: 良好的睡眠有助於孩子的成長。

examples.en: Walking is an exciting milestone for babies.
examples.zh: 走路是寶寶令人興奮的里程碑。

examples.en: We celebrate every little milestone.
examples.zh: 我們慶祝每一個小小的里程碑。

examples.en: The baby babbles happily in the morning.
examples.zh: 寶寶早上會開心地牙牙學語。

examples.en: She babbles as if telling a story.
examples.zh: 她咿咿呀呀的,好像在講故事。

examples.en: The toddler threw a tantrum in the store.
examples.zh: 那個幼兒在商店裡大鬧脾氣。

examples.en: Stay calm when your child has a tantrum.
examples.zh: 孩子鬧脾氣時要保持冷靜。

examples.en: The baby loves to cuddle before sleep.
examples.zh: 寶寶睡前喜歡依偎撒嬌。

examples.en: They cuddled on the sofa all afternoon.
examples.zh: 他們整個下午都窩在沙發上摟抱著。

examples.en: She rocks the baby gently to sleep.
examples.zh: 她輕輕搖著寶寶入睡。

examples.en: He rocked the cradle back and forth.
examples.zh: 他來回搖著搖籃。

examples.en: We bathe the baby every evening.
examples.zh: 我們每天晚上幫寶寶洗澡。

examples.en: Always test the water before you bathe him.
examples.zh: 幫他洗澡前一定要先試水溫。

examples.en: The baby looks cute in the striped onesie.
examples.zh: 寶寶穿條紋連身衣看起來好可愛。

examples.en: I packed three onesies for the trip.
examples.zh: 我為這趟旅行打包了三件連身衣。

examples.en: I love his chubby little cheeks.
examples.zh: 我好愛他胖嘟嘟的小臉頰。

examples.en: The baby has chubby arms and legs.
examples.zh: 寶寶有著圓潤的手臂和腿。

examples.en: Be gentle when you hold the newborn.
examples.zh: 抱新生兒時要溫柔。

examples.en: She has a gentle way with children.
examples.zh: 她對孩子很溫柔。

examples.en: A newborn sleeps most of the day.
examples.zh: 新生兒一天大部分時間都在睡覺。

examples.en: The newborn gripped my finger tightly.
examples.zh: 新生兒緊緊抓住我的手指。

examples.en: The infant needs feeding every few hours.
examples.zh: 這名嬰兒每隔幾小時就需要餵一次。

examples.en: Car seats are required for every infant.
examples.zh: 每個嬰兒都必須使用安全座椅。

examples.en: The cream helps clear up diaper rash.
examples.zh: 這款乳膏有助於改善尿布疹。

examples.en: Change diapers often to prevent diaper rash.
examples.zh: 勤換尿布以預防尿布疹。

examples.en: We read a story every bedtime.
examples.zh: 我們每天就寢時間都讀故事。

examples.en: A steady bedtime helps the baby sleep well.
examples.zh: 固定的就寢時間有助於寶寶睡得好。

examples.en: A daily routine keeps the baby calm.
examples.zh: 規律的作息能讓寶寶保持平靜。

examples.en: Bath, milk, and sleep is our nightly routine.
examples.zh: 洗澡、喝奶、睡覺是我們每晚的例行流程。

examples.en: We slowly weaned her off the bottle.
examples.zh: 我們慢慢地幫她戒掉奶瓶。

examples.en: Most babies are weaned around one year.
examples.zh: 大多數寶寶在一歲左右斷奶。

examples.en: The baby gets cranky when he is hungry.
examples.zh: 寶寶餓的時候會變得暴躁。

examples.en: She was cranky after a short nap.
examples.zh: 她小睡不夠後變得脾氣暴躁。

examples.en: We are teaching him to use the potty.
examples.zh: 我們正在教他使用便盆。

examples.en: She sat on the potty like a big girl.
examples.zh: 她像個大女孩一樣坐在便盆上。

examples.en: She spread the snacks on the highchair tray.
examples.zh: 她把點心攤在餐椅托盤上。

examples.en: Wipe the highchair tray after each meal.
examples.zh: 每餐後擦拭餐椅托盤。

examples.en: The toddler clings to his mom at daycare.
examples.zh: 這個幼兒在托嬰中心緊黏著媽媽。

examples.en: She clings to her blanket wherever she goes.
examples.zh: 她走到哪都緊抓著她的小毯子。

examples.en: The baby played safely in the playpen.
examples.zh: 寶寶在遊戲圍欄裡安全地玩耍。

examples.en: I put a few toys in the playpen for her.
examples.zh: 我在遊戲圍欄裡放了幾個玩具給她。

examples.en: It is time to feed the baby again.
examples.zh: 又到了餵寶寶的時間了。

examples.en: He learned to feed himself with a spoon.
examples.zh: 他學會了自己用湯匙吃飯。

examples.en: Don't forget the diaper bag before we leave.
examples.zh: 出門前別忘了媽媽包。

examples.en: The diaper bag has room for bottles and wipes.
examples.zh: 這個媽媽包有空間放奶瓶和濕紙巾。
